SQL: SELECT DISTINCT OM.*,PFOPTN OOPT
FROM MPDHED H
JOIN V_MITMAS_WPP M  ON H.PHPRNO = M.MMITNO
JOIN MPFEHE F ON H.PHPRNO = F.PUPRNO
JOIN MPDFHE FM ON  F.PUFTID = FM.PEFTID
JOIN MPDVOF O  ON F.PUFTID = O.PLFTID
JOIN MPDOPT OM ON O.PLOPTN = OM.PFOPTN
WHERE H.PHFACI IN ('200','250','260','300','350')
AND M.MMSTAT = '20'
ORDER BY OM.PFOPTN

SQL:SELECT DISTINCT FM.*
FROM MPDHED H
JOIN MPFEHE F ON H.PHPRNO = F.PUPRNO
JOIN MPDFHE FM ON  F.PUFTID = FM.PEFTID
WHERE H.PHFACI IN ('200','250','260','300')
ORDER BY FM.PEFTID

SQL:SELECT DISTINCT O.*,FM.PEFTID 
FROM MPDHED H
JOIN V_MITMAS_WPP M  ON H.PHPRNO = M.MMITNO
JOIN MPFEHE F ON H.PHPRNO = F.PUPRNO
JOIN MPDFHE FM ON  F.PUFTID = FM.PEFTID
JOIN MPDVOF O  ON F.PUFTID = O.PLFTID
JOIN MPDOPT OM ON O.PLOPTN = OM.PFOPTN
WHERE H.PHFACI IN ('200','250','260','300','350')
ORDER BY FM.PEFTID,O.PLOPTN

SQL:with V_MITMAS_301 as (

MCO_SHEET: Item Master Connect Alternate Units of Measure
SOURCE_FILE:
SQL:WITH V_MITMAS_301 AS (
SELECT *
FROM MITMAS
WHERE MMSTAT NOT IN ('90', '80')
AND MMITNO IN (SELECT MBITNO FROM MITBAL WHERE MBWHLO in ('301'))
) , 
V_MITAUN_301 AS (
SELECT MUCONO, MUITNO, MUAUTP, MUALUN, MUDCCD
, MUCOFA, MUDMCF, MUPCOF, MUAUS1, MUAUS2
, MUAUS3, MUAUS4, MUAUS5, MUAUS6, MUAUS9
, MUUNMU, MUTXID, MURGDT, MURGTM, MULMDT
, MUCHNO,  MUCHID
FROM MITAUN
WHERE (MUITNO IN (SELECT MMITNO FROM V_MITMAS_301))
)

SELECT UM.*,M.MMVAMT
FROM V_MITAUN_WPP UM
LEFT OUTER JOIN V_MITMAS_301 M ON UM.MUITNO = M.MMITNO
WHERE UM.MUITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'

SQL:with V_MITMAS_WPP as (
SELECT *
FROM 
    MITMAS
WHERE 
    MMSTAT NOT IN ('90', '80')
    AND MMITNO IN (
        SELECT MBITNO 
        FROM MITBAL 
        WHERE MBWHLO in ('301')
    ))

    select mas.*
    ,mpr.MMCONO AS MP_MMCONO,
    mpr.MMITNO AS MP_MMITNO,
    mpr.MMSUNO,
    mpr.MMPUPR,
    mpr.MMPUCD,
    mpr.MMCUCD,
    mpr.MMPPDT,
    mpr.MMSAPR,
    mpr.MMSTUN,
    mpr.MMSACD,
    mpr.MMCUCS,
    mpr.MMSPDT,
    mpr.MMDIGI,
    mpr.MMBGRP,
    mpr.MMPRVG,
    mpr.MMFRE3,
    mpr.MMFRE4,
    mpr.MMEACD,
    mpr.MMOTDI,
    mpr.MMBOGR,
    mpr.MMPRGR,
    mpr.MMLAMA,
    mpr.MMACHK,
    mpr.MMBPEY,
    mpr.MMSPUN,
    mpr.MMSPUC,
    mpr.MMALUN,
    mpr.MMRGDT AS MP_MMRGDT,
    mpr.MMRGTM AS MP_MMRGTM,
    mpr.MMLMDT AS MP_MMLMDT,
    mpr.MMCHNO AS MP_MMCHNO,
    mpr.MMCHID AS MP_MMCHID

    FROM dbo.V_MITMAS_WPP mas
LEFT JOIN MITMPR mpr ON mas.MMITNO = mpr.MMITNO
WHERE mas.MMITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'
AND mpr.MMITNO NOT LIKE 'ZZ%'
and  MMCHCD <> 3
